text:
Mental Status Change (Dsch) CHAR 1 This column documents whether there Is evidence of an acute change in mental status from the patient's baseline at the time of discharge. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
470 DFCLTY_ATTN_ADMSN_CD DFCLTY_ATTN_ADMSN_CD Delirium: Inattention (Adm) CHAR 1 At the time of admission, did the patient have difficulty focusing attention, for example, being easily distractible or having difficulty keeping track of what was being said? 0 = Behavior not
